page_metadata.biotools__summary: FGDB is a database of follicle stimulating hormone glycans. FGDB provides fucosylated and non-fucosylated glycans associated with Follicle Stimulating Hormones (FSH) in human.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: FGDB is a database of follicle stimulating hormone glycans. FGDB provides fucosylated and non-fucosylated glycans associated with Follicle Stimulating Hormones (FSH) in human.
